---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new prompt layer, skill, router behaviour, or CLI capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

What would you like Babel to do that it does not do today?

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Proposed approach

How do you imagine this fitting into the existing layer structure (System Router, Behavioral OS, Domain Architect, Skill, Model Adapter, Overlay)?

## Layer(s) affected

- [ ] `00_System_Router`
- [ ] `01_Behavioral_OS`
- [ ] `02_Domain_Architects`
- [ ] `02_Skills`
- [ ] `03_Model_Adapters`
- [ ] `04_Meta_Tools`
- [ ] `05_Project_Overlays` / `06_Task_Overlays`
- [ ] `babel-cli`
- [ ] `prompt_catalog.yaml`
- [ ] Other / unsure

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you evaluated.

## Additional context

Links, examples, or related issues.
